page: Hetzner Cloud cpx42 is an x86_64 virtual server powered by an AMD EPYC processor running at 2.0 GHz. It features 8 vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with a shared CPU allocation model. The system is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 1.95 GB of RAM per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 320 GB SSD, and the instance does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the cpx42 demonstrates strong single-core performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 3045.18 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1993.0, both placing in the top 25%. Multi-core performance is moderate, yielding a Geekbench multi-core score of 8870.0. Memory subsystem testing shows highly efficient write capabilities, with large-block write bandwidth reaching 168.09 GB/sec, placing it in the top 10% tier. Large-block read-only memory bandwidth is also strong at 255.54 GB/sec.

Given its shared CPU allocation and 1:2 memory-to-vCPU ratio, the cpx42 offers a cost-effective entry point for compute-focused workloads that do not require dedicated physical cores. It is well-suited for applications such as static web serving, where it achieves a throughput of 8.31 GB/sec, and lightweight database operations, processing 20.87 million Redis SET operations per second. The instance is also capable of handling small-scale machine learning tasks, demonstrating a strong text generation speed of 283.9 tokens/second on a 135M parameter model.
description: Hetzner Cloud cpx42 is an x86_64 virtual server configured with 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz, 16.0 GB of RAM, and 320 GB of local SSD storage. The instance features a 1:2 memory-to-vCPU ratio and lacks dedicated GPU resources. In benchmark testing, the cpx42 delivers strong single-core performance and top-tier large-block memory write bandwidth of 168.09 GB/sec, while multi-core metrics remain average. This resource profile makes the instance a cost-effective option for workloads requiring moderate compute density without the premium of dedicated cores. It is highly suitable for static web serving, lightweight database operations, and small-scale text generation tasks.
og_description: Hetzner Cloud cpx42 is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and 320 GB of local SSD storage, delivering strong single-core performance for budget-conscious workloads.
meta_description: Hetzner Cloud cpx42 is an x86_64 virtual server with 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16.0 GB RAM, and 320 GB SSD storage, optimized for entry-level compute tasks.
tagline: A cost-effective, shared-core virtual server combining eight AMD EPYC vCPUs with local SSD storage for compute-focused workloads.
bullet_points: 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory
Strong single-core CPU and top-tier memory write performance
Suitable for static web serving and lightweight database operations
